title: North Beach Park and Natural Area - Parks | seattle.gov
content: # North Beach Park and Natural Area. 8999 24th Ave. NW, Seattle, WA 98117. Phone: (206) 684-4075 684-4075). North Beach Park trail entrance. This wooded ravine in northwest Seattle offers a gravel walking path through dense woods and wetlands. North Beach Park and Natural Area is a mix of publicly- and privately-owned lands, situated between 24th Ave NW and Earl Ave NW, and between NW 89th St and NW 93rd Streets. Access is at 24th Ave NW at NW 90th St. North Beach Park and Natural Area is not to be confused with North Beach Ravine, an unimproved collection of properties also managed by Seattle Parks & Recreation a few blocks to the west. North Beach Ravine is located between 29th Ave NW and 30th Ave NW, with plots scattered between NW 89th St to just north of NW 94th St. ## Support North Beach Park and Natural Area. Thank you for your donation through the Seattle Parks Foundation. ## Parks and Recreation. Fax: (206) 615-1813 615-1813).
